rationale: The synthetic det_clone_end_point_equal predicate requires r1.id == r2.id where id: Vec<u8>. clone_end_point's contract only ensures cloned_ep@ == ep@ (view-level equality). In Verus, spec equality on Vec is opaque and is NOT equivalent to view equality; verified empirically with minimal test cases (v1@ == v2@ does not imply v1 == v2 for Vec<u8>, even with broadcast use of group_vec_axioms and lemma_vec_obeys_view_eq). No vstd axiom bridges view equality to Vec spec equality. The proof is unprovable without an assume()/axiom which is forbidden. Best-effort proof block left in place asserting derivable view-level facts.
